calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing On Application For Judgment; Interest In Computation
Off Calendar Oct-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Howard G. Curtis, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NCR CONSTRUCTION, INC.,
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NEHEMIAH ELIJAH BROWN, JR., a natural person doing business as Precision Drywall Co.; and Precision Drywall Co., a business organization, form unknown, jointly and severally.
Attachment 7: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that claims by defendants Nehemiah Elijah Brown, Jr. and Precision Drywall Co., against Payment Bond No. 1000905454, issued by the American Contractors Indemnity Company, as surety, for labor and materials furnished for the private work of improvement known as the "Hotel Isabel Renovation," are irrevocably time-barred by Civil Code Section 8610 inasmuch as more than six months have passed since the Notice of Completion was recorded for said work of improvement and defendants failed to coommence a timely action to enforce the liability on the aforsaid Payment Bond.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- dismissed.
Barbara Nestal sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $5,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $230.16
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $944.73
Total Judgment in the amount of $6,174.89
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
